Name: Insertion Sort
Author: John Mauchly
Description: Insertion sort is a simple sorting algorithm that builds the final sorted array one item at a time. It is much less efficient on large lists than more advanced algorithms such as quicksort, heapsort, or merge sort. However, it provides several advantages: simple implementation, efficient for small data sets, and adaptive (efficient for data sets that are already substantially sorted).
Algorithm: async function sort(){for(let a=1;a<array.length;a++){let r=a;for(;r>0;){await compare(r,r-1);if(array[r]<array[r-1]){if(swap(r-1,r),await sleep(),firstRun)return;r--}else break}}}
